rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND L. MAR REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petioner/Responded Gregory Mar'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Respondents/Petitioners Petition For Order Confirming Appointment Of Jennifer Winship As Independent Special Trustee; For Order Expunging Lis Pendens; For Order Voiding Deeds; For Order Confirming Title Of Trust Real Property; For Order That Trustee Has Exclusive Possession Of Trust Real Property; For Order That Gregory Mar Immediately Vacate The Trust Real Property; And For Order Confirming That Independent Special Trustee Is Not Required To Provide Further Relocation Assistance Or Housing Options To Gregory Mar
rulings.Rulings: Per the Court's July 3, 2025 Order After Hearing Re Demurrer Filed June 30, 2025, the Demurrer is DISMISSED as moot, and hearing on the demurrer is VACATED.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DURABLE POWER OF ATTORNEY OF CARMEN E. BROWN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Original Petition; Request For Continuance Of Trial And Related Deadlines; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Steven M. Murphy. Before the court is Petitioner Gene Brown's Motion for Leave to Amend Original Petition; Request for Continuance of Trial and Related Deadlines ("Motion"). The Motion is DENIED as procedurally defective under Code of Civil Procedure section 1005. Under California Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b ), the moving party is required to file and serve all moving papers at least 16 court days before the hearing date. When service is made by mail within California, an additional 5 calendar days are required. Here, per the Notice of Motion, the motion and supporting declaration were served by mail on July 14, 2025, for a July 31, 2025 hearing. This time period does not meet the statutory requirements. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
